title: 8 teas to help hairdressers with boils
description: Calendula officinalis teas have been traditionally used to help with boils due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The tea contains triterpenoids, flavonoids, and saponins, which work together to reduce swelling, fight off infection, and promote healing. The antimicrobial properties help to combat bacteria and other microorganisms that can cause boils.
